## Description
**What documentation issue are you reporting?**

- [ ] Unclear or confusing explanation
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Broken links or examples
- [ ] Poor formatting or readability
- [ ] Other

## Location
**Where is this issue located?**

- File/URL: (e.g., README.md, docs/FEATURE.md, or GitHub wiki page)
- Line/Section: (if applicable)

## Details
**Describe the documentation issue**

A clear and concise description of what needs to be improved or fixed.

## Current Text (if applicable)
```
Quote the current documentation that needs improvement
```

## Suggested Improvement
**How should this be improved?**

```
Provide your suggested improvement or corrected text
```

## Additional Context
**Any other relevant information?**

- [ ] I have reviewed similar documentation
- [ ] This is not a bug report or feature request
